coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of what automated machine learning automates in modeling
Ability to run an AutoML library on a tabular dataset following examples
Elementary knowledge of splitting data into train, validation and test sets
Ability to launch a hyperparameter search over a small grid under supervision
Basic understanding of what a hyperparameter is and how it affects a model
Ability to read a leaderboard of candidate models and pick the top one
Elementary knowledge of common metrics such as accuracy and error
Basic understanding of overfitting and why a held-out set matters
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of Python and pandas
Familiarity with scikit-learn estimators
Elementary understanding of cross-validation
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Can run existing AutoML scripts with detailed guidance
Needs 3-6 months to be productive

coreCompetencies: Ability to configure a hyperparameter search with defined ranges and budgets
Practical knowledge of random search and grid search trade-offs
Ability to run automated feature preprocessing and encoding pipelines
Understanding of early stopping to cut off unpromising trials
Ability to compare AutoML results against a simple manual baseline
Knowledge of cross-validation strategies to estimate generalization
Ability to handle categorical, numerical and missing values automatically
Understanding of compute budgets and how they bound a search
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of tree-based models such as gradient boosting
Familiarity with AutoML tools such as Auto-sklearn or FLAML
Basic understanding of experiment tracking
indicators: Can run AutoML experiments independently
Resolves medium complexity issues in search configuration
Actively participates in code reviews

coreCompetencies: Ability to run Bayesian optimization for hyperparameter tuning
Ability to apply Hyperband and successive halving to allocate compute efficiently
Deep knowledge of automated feature engineering and selection techniques
Ability to design honest evaluation protocols against manual baselines
Understanding of data leakage and how to prevent it in automated pipelines
Ability to set compute budgets and early stopping across many trials
Knowledge of nested cross-validation for unbiased model selection
Ability to instrument AutoML runs with experiment tracking and metrics
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of neural architecture search fundamentals
Ability to build reusable preprocessing and feature pipelines
Basic understanding of meta-learning for warm-starting search
indicators: Completes complex AutoML tasks with minimal supervision
Identifies and resolves failures in search and evaluation
Actively contributes to technical design of AutoML pipelines

coreCompetencies: Ability to design end-to-end AutoML pipelines from data to deployed model
Mastery of hyperparameter optimization with Bayesian methods and Hyperband
Ability to build neural architecture search within a bounded compute budget
Deep knowledge of automated feature engineering, selection and encoding
Ability to design evaluation that honestly compares against strong manual baselines
Mastery of budget allocation, early stopping and resource-aware scheduling
Ability to build meta-learning to warm-start search from prior tasks
Knowledge of preventing leakage and overfitting in automated search
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of multi-fidelity optimization and surrogate models
Ability to design experiment tracking and reproducibility standards
Understanding of model selection under distribution shift
indicators: Leads development of critical AutoML components
Effectively mentors junior engineers
Makes informed architectural decisions on AutoML design

coreCompetencies: Expertise in designing production AutoML platforms for many teams and datasets
Ability to architect scalable distributed hyperparameter and architecture search
Mastery of evaluation-driven development with honest baselines and leakage checks
Deep knowledge of meta-learning across tasks to accelerate search
Ability to design compute-budget governance across concurrent search jobs
Expertise in optimizing the accuracy, compute and time trade-off of search
Ability to build observability for trials, resource use and model quality
Mastery of reproducibility and versioning for automated experiments
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of neural architecture search at scale with weight sharing
Ability to design AutoML benchmarks against manual expert baselines
Understanding of fairness and robustness checks in automated selection
indicators: Designs AutoML architectures for complete products
Defines team technical standards for AutoML development
Leads cross-team initiatives on AutoML infrastructure

coreCompetencies: Ability to architect enterprise AutoML platforms shared across many teams
Expertise in governance frameworks for automated model selection and deployment
Mastery of evaluation infrastructure that guards against leakage and inflated metrics
Ability to lead build-versus-buy decisions for AutoML tooling
Deep knowledge of compute cost governance for large-scale search
Ability to lead adoption of AutoML to complement expert data science teams
Expertise in reproducibility and audit trails for automated modeling
Mastery of reliability engineering for long-running distributed search
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of emerging optimization methods and open AutoML ecosystems
Ability to design reusable search spaces and baseline catalogs
Understanding of regulatory constraints on automated decision models
indicators: Architects AutoML solutions for multiple teams
Influences organizational technical decisions on AutoML
Represents the company technically in the AutoML domain

coreCompetencies: Technical leadership of organization-wide AutoML adoption
Ability to design AutoML architectures resilient to tooling and vendor change
Expertise in strategies for scaling automated modeling across many domains
Mastery of framework-agnostic abstractions across search and optimization tools
Ability to define multi-year roadmaps for AutoML capabilities
Deep knowledge of the economics and compute cost of automated search
Expertise in building and scaling AutoML engineering teams
Ability to set standards for honest evaluation and baseline comparison
complementaryCompetencies: Ability to evaluate AutoML vendors and open-source frameworks technically
Knowledge of research trends in optimization, NAS and meta-learning
Ability to shape internal policy on automated model governance
indicators: Defines organizational technical strategy for AutoML
Recognized as an authority in applied AutoML
Speaker at industry conferences on automated machine learning

coreCompetencies: Ability to set the long-term technical direction for AutoML in the organization
Expertise in aligning AutoML investment with data science and product priorities
Mastery of technical due diligence for AutoML products and acquisitions
Ability to anticipate shifts in optimization methods and adapt platform strategy
Deep knowledge of the risk and compliance landscape for automated decisions
Ability to build and lead AutoML engineering organizations
Expertise in defining honest evaluation and governance practices at scale
Ability to guide trade-offs between automated search and expert modeling
complementaryCompetencies: Ability to inform industry standards for automated model documentation
Knowledge of the AutoML tooling and compute vendor landscape
Ability to advise leadership on AutoML risk and opportunity
indicators: Shapes the technical direction of AutoML in the organization

coreCompetencies: Ability to define the organization's AutoML technical vision and governance posture
Expertise in aligning AutoML strategy with product direction and regulation
Mastery of governing compute investment for large-scale automated search
Ability to steer sourcing of AutoML tooling across vendors and open source

Expertise in setting standards for evaluation, documentation and audit of models

Knowledge of the AutoML vendor, compute and talent ecosystem
